about.online_tool: Rayuwa Dictionaries ne mobile-friendly yanar gizo kayan aikin da Support miyagun, a karkashin-wakilta da kuma diasporic harsuna.
about.promote_connectivity: Jagorancin al'umma gwagwarmaya a duniya, Living Dictionaries ne hadin baki multimedia ayyukan da taimako harsuna tsira ga al'ummomi masu zuwa.
about.td_beginnings: Asali da aka sani da "Talking Dictionary" software, mu dandali aka farko kaddamar a 2006 ta Living Harsuna masana ilimin harsuna Gregory D. S. Anderson da kuma K. David Harrison. A shekarar 2020, Living Harsuna Cibiyar sabunta sunan da kayan aiki don Living Dictionaries.
about.manage_entries: Sarrafa Dictionary: View & Edit Entries a Real-Time
about.private_public: Sa Dictionaries matsayin Private ko Jama'a
about.language_is_history: Harsuna suna Adam ta rai tarihi. suka encode ƙarni na kakanninmu hikima alaka da yanayi, na gida da al'adu da kuma yafi. Harshe ne m, m ruwan tabarau ta hanyar abin da muka gane da duniya da kuma bayyana kanmu. Akwai kan 3,000 barazana da kuma miyagun harsuna a duniya, da kuma shi ne har zuwa mu a halin yanzu tsara don magance wannan matsala da gaggawa kafin yana da latti.
about.important_to_document: Ba wai kawai yake da muhimmanci a kimiyance daftarin aiki da kuma kiyaye miyagun harsuna, amma daga wani ilimi bisa, koyo daya ta al'adunmu harshe ne mai goyon baya ga al'ummomin da suke so su kare kuma ka yi tasbĩhi da al'adunsu da, gida, kazalika da waje ba. Sanin game da daya ta bangaren ilimin harsuna da al'adu asalin yana gagarumin, m kiwon lafiya tasirin, da kuma wannan fassara ga mafi alheri daga cikin al'umma a cikin dogon lokacin da.
about.what_is_LT: Mene ne Living Harsuna Institute for miyagun Harsuna?
about.leading_research: Living Harsuna Cibiyar miyagun Harsunan ne a manyan bincike kungiyar sadaukar domin tattara bayanai miyagun harsuna. Kafa ta masanin ilimin harsuna Dr. Gregory D. S. Anderson, Living Harsuna Institute ne ba riba bincike institute tushen a Salem, Oregon, da m masu bincike da kuma hadin gwiwar dake ko'ina cikin duniya.
about.two_decades_experience: Tare da kusan biyu shekarun da suka gabata na fieldwork kwarewa, masu bincike, a Living Harsuna Institute for miyagun Harsuna suna da basira da kuma hanyoyin da wuri don taimakon al'umma daftarin aiki, kare, da kuma gabatar da su harsuna.
about.help_us_launch_more: Taimako Mu Launch More Rayuwa Dictionaries
about.with_your_help: Tare da taimakon ku, za mu iya ci gaba da inganta mu software da kuma yin shi samuwa ga wani al'umma cewa yanã son ya haifar da nasu Living Dictionary. Ba da kyauta yau kuma yi tasiri!
about.import_export: Shigo da/Fitar da kaya (FLex, Tsarin Daidaitacce)
about.flashcard_view: Duba Katin Flashcard ga ɗaliban Harshe
about.push_notifications: Tura Sanarwa ga Masu Ba da Gudummawa
about.contributor_awards: Kyaututtukan Al'umma Masu Ba da Gudummawa
about.question_1: Don Allah a ba da wasu bayanai game da wannan harshe. A ina ake magana da shi? Waɗanne al'ummomi ne ke magana da wannan harshe? Shin wannan harshe yana fuskantar barazana?
about.question_2: Menene sunayen mutanen da suka gina wannan ƙamus? Muryoyin wa ke cikin wannan ƙamus?
about.question_3: Daga ina bayanai da ke cikin wannan ƙamus suka fito? Da fatan za a bayyana ko kun tattara bayanan da kanku. Idan kun yi amfani da wasu hanyoyin bincike da aka buga, da fatan za a lissafa su.
about.question_4: Wa zai yi amfani da wannan ƙamus? Za a yi amfani da shi a cikin duk wani aikin ilimi?
about.question_5: Idan kana son jama'a su tuntube ka game da wannan aikin, da fatan za a bayar da bayanan tuntuɓarka, ko hanyar haɗi zuwa inda mutane za su iya ƙarin koyo. Wannan zaɓi ne.
about.message: Kafin a bai wa ƙamus ɗinka jama'a, da fatan za a cike sashen Game da shi.

contributors.ld_produced_by: Wannan Living Dictionary da aka samar a Living Harsuna Institute for miyagun Harsuna karkashin shugabanci na wadannan mutane:

contributors.manager_contributor_distinction: Lura: Manajan ƙamus na iya ƙarawa, gyarawa ko share abun ciki. Masu ba da gudummawa haɗin gwiwar aiki ne waɗanda kuma za su iya ƙarawa da gyarawa, amma ba za su iya goge kowane abun ciki ba.

create.speech_community_permission: Shin magana al'umma damar wannan harshe ya zama online? Zabi 'OK' idan sun yi muku izni.
create.at_least_one_lang: Zabi akalla 1 harshen da ya sa ƙamus samuwa a.
create.only_letters_numbers: Kawai haruffa da lambobi yarda (babu fili ko haruffa na musamman)
create.gloss_dictionary_clarification: Harshe (s) kana so ka fassara shigarwar cikin.
create.name_clarification: Wannan zai zama sunan da kamus.
create.permanent_url_msg: Sunan URL ɗin na dindindin ne kuma ba za a iya canza shi daga baya ba.
create.add_gloss_msg: Za ka iya ƙara ƙarin harsunan sheƙi daga baya a ƙarƙashin Saituna.
create.language_used_by_community: Shin wannan ƙamus na nufin harshe ne da wata al'umma ta ɗan adam ke magana ko kuma take sanya hannu a kai?
create.community_permission: Shin al'ummar harshe sun ba ku izinin yin wannan ƙamus?
create.author_connection: Don Allah a ɗan bayyana yadda ka san wannan harshe da kuma dalilin da yasa kake ƙirƙirar Kamus na Rayuwa don shi. Shin kai ɓangare ne na al'ummar da za ta yi amfani da wannan Kamus na Rayuwa? Idan ba haka ba, ta yaya za ka san al'ummar?
create.con_lang_description: Shin wannan ƙamus na harshe ne da aka gina (harshe da mutane suka ƙirƙiro a cikin 'yan shekarun nan, don littafi ko fim)? Idan eh, don Allah a ɗan yi bayani.
create.map_instructions: Danna kan taswira don ƙara daidaitattun abubuwan haɗin gwiwa.
create.print_access: Ba wa Masu kallo damar buga ƙamus
create.conlang_question: Shin wannan harshe ne da aka gina ko kuma harshe na wucin gadi?
create.conlang_info_1: Tunda manufarmu ta mayar da hankali kan tattara bayanai game da harsunan ɗan adam na halitta da ke fuskantar barazanar ɓacewa da kuma waɗanda ba su da yawa, ba ma bayar da tallafin fasaha ga harsunan da aka gina (conlangs) ko harsunan roba. Saboda ƙaramin ƙungiyarmu da ƙarancin sa'o'i na aiki, ba ma bayar da bayanai ga masu magana da harshen.
create.conlang_info_2: Ba za a bayyana ƙamus na harsunan da aka gina a shafin yanar gizon mu ba ko kuma a same su a taswirar shafin yanar gizon mu. Idan muka ga abubuwan da ke ɓata wa rai a cikin wannan ƙamus na Rayuwa, muna da ikon goge su.
create.agree_above: Na yarda da abin da ke sama.
create.agree_to_cite: Na yarda in ambaci duk wani aiki da aka buga a cikin ƙamus.
create.agree_for_non-commercial: Na yarda cewa wannan aikin ba na kasuwanci ba ne.
create.source_question: Daga ina bayanai da ke cikin wannan ƙamus suka fito? Da fatan za a bayyana ko kun tattara bayanan da kanku. Idan kun yi amfani da wasu hanyoyin bincike da aka buga, da fatan za a lissafa su a nan.
create.use_question: Wa zai yi amfani da wannan ƙamus? Za a yi amfani da shi a cikin duk wani aikin ilimi ko na kafofin watsa labarai?
create.conlang_warning: Idan wannan ƙamus ɗin ya kasance don harshe da aka gina (ko na wucin gadi), kuma ba ku nuna hakan ba, muna da ikon cire shi.

entry.signed_in_as_manager: Ka dole ne a sanya hannu a matsayin manajan wannan kamus yi canje-canje.
entry.source_message: Idan {media} ta fito daga yanar gizo, da fatan za a haɗa da hanyar haɗin yanar gizo da lasisin {media}, idan ya dace
entry.rights: Ina da ikon loda fayil ɗin {media}

error.run_into_error: Muna yi hakuri, mun gudu a cikin wani kuskure.
error.error_recorded: The kuskure da aka rubuta da kuma za mu iya neman shiga da shi.
error.please_explain: Za ka iya don Allah ka aika mana da wani short note don bayyana abin faru?

home.main_banner: Yana hidima ga al'ummomin harsuna sama da 200 a faɗin duniya tare da rubuce-rubuce sama da miliyan 1/4 da aka buga, da kuma ɗaruruwan ƙamus da ake ci gaba da gudanarwa.

misc.out_of_service:
Mun gode da ziyartar gidan yanar gizon mu! Wannan shafin yana kan aiki na ɗan lokaci.
Ba zai kasance tsakanin 3 ga Fabrairu da 28 ga Fabrairu, 2025 ba.
Da fatan za a sake ziyartar wannan shafin a ranar 1 ga Maris, 2025.
Za ku iya ƙirƙirar sabbin Kamus na Rayuwa a wannan lokacin.
Yi haƙuri da rashin jin daɗin, kuma na gode da haƙurinku.
A halin yanzu, sauran dandamalin yana aiki yadda ya kamata.

settings.community_permission: Shin magana al'umma damar wannan harshe ya zama online?
settings.public_private_meaning: Jama'a nufin kowa zai iya gani da ƙamus da bukatar al'umma yarda. Private kamus ne bayyane ne kawai zuwa gare ku, kuma ku hadin gwiwar.
settings.unable_to_delete: Lura: ba za ka iya goge waɗannan harsunan masu sheƙi daga baya ba.
settings.print_access_meaning: Wannan yana ba wa jama'a damar saukewa da buga wannan Kamus na Rayuwa a matsayin .PDF

video.prepare_to_record_video: Shirya don yin rikodi da Makirufo & Kyamara
video.video_info: Akwai hanyoyi guda biyu da za a nuna bidiyon ku a cikin Kamus na Rayuwa: 1) Kuna iya yin rikodin bidiyon ku a nan, ko kuma ku ɗora bidiyon da kuka yi rikodin a baya zuwa dandamalinmu. Fa'idodi: mai sauƙi kuma mai kyau don yin rikodin sauri. Rashin Kyau: Kuna iya loda bidiyo har zuwa 100MB kawai don haka dole ne ya zama gajere kuma mai ƙarancin ƙuduri. 2) Sanya bidiyon ku a kan sabis na karɓar baƙi wanda ya ƙware a adana bidiyo kuma ya haɗa URL ɗin zuwa shafinmu. Fa'idodi: mai sauƙi (muddin an riga an ɗora bidiyon ku akan wannan dandamali), bidiyon ku na iya samun ƙuduri da tsawon da kuke so. Rashin Kyau: idan kuna son yin rikodin wani abu da ba a zata ba ko mai sauƙi, yana iya zama ƙoƙari sosai don yin hakan ta wannan hanyar, kuma kuna iya son fifita hanya ta 1.
video.paste_video_url: Manna hanyar haɗin YouTube ko Vimeo
video.previously_dismissed_msg: Idan a baya kun yi watsi da buƙatar mai binciken, da fatan za a sake lodawa kuma danna 'Ee' lokacin da mai bincikenku ya nemi izini.
video.permission_denied: An hana izinin shiga kafofin watsa labarai.

print.availability: Duba bugu yana samuwa ne kawai ga manajojin ƙamus da masu ba da gudummawa

import_page.instructions_1: Idan kana da bayanan harshe da kake son shigar da su cikin Kamus ɗinka, da fatan za a bi matakan da ke ƙasa.
import_page.instructions_2: Danna maɓallin shuɗi mai suna "Haɗi zuwa Samfura" da ke ƙasa. Sauke samfurin a matsayin fayil ɗin Excel, ko ƙirƙirar kwafi akan Google Docs. Shirya samfurin bisa ga buƙatun aikinka. Kwafi kuma liƙa bayananka a cikin maƙunsar bayanai.
import_page.instructions_3: Yi amfani da "Tuntuɓe Mu" da ke ƙasa don tuntuɓar mu. Sanar da mu cewa kuna da sabon takardar lissafi wanda aka shirya don shigo da shi. Yi mana duk wata tambaya da kuke da ita. Za mu amsa muku ta imel, sannan za ku iya aiko mana da fayil ɗinku.
import_page.instructions_4: Domin aiko mana da bayanai daga manhajojin ƙamus kamar FLex, Lexique Pro, da Shoebox, da fatan za a yi amfani da maɓallin "Tuntuɓe Mu" da ke ƙasa kuma ku gaya mana cikakkun bayanai game da aikinku.
import_page.no_imports: A halin yanzu muna aiki tare da al'ummomi da ƙungiyoyi masu haɗin gwiwa da yawa don shigo da adadi mai yawa na shigarwar ƙamus zuwa wannan dandamali. Muna kuma yin manyan sabuntawa ga rumbun adana bayanai. Za mu karɓi sabbin bayanai daga ranar 1 ga Yuli, 2024. Muna godiya da haƙurinku, kuma muna ba da haƙuri game da rashin jin daɗin.

banner.message: Za mu yi gyare-gyare ga rumbun adana bayanai namu a ranar 22 ga Oktoba, farawa da ƙarfe 7 na yamma agogon Gabas (New York), na tsawon awanni 24. Ba za a sami damar gyarawa a wannan lokacin ba. Yi haƙuri da rashin jin daɗin.
